name: Pasta Labella Sunny Summer Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 medium red bell peppers, seeded and chopped
salt and white pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the lemon pepper pasta according to the cooking instructions on the package.
2. Cook the tomato basil pasta separately to keep flavors distinct.
3. Chill both types of pasta in a colander under cold running water.
4. Reserve enough cooking water from the lemon pepper pasta to cook the asparagus.
5. Blanch the asparagus in boiling water until tender, then chill.
6. Toss all ingredients together, adjusting the seasoning with salt and white pepper.
